indicators.name: brick walls
indicators.rationale: Brick walls can be cold and uncomfortable to touch, potentially disrupting sleep.

indicators.name: glass windows
indicators.rationale: Glass windows allow natural light to enter, which can be disruptive to sleep patterns.

indicators.name: metal railings
indicators.rationale: Metal railings can be noisy and distracting, potentially disturbing sleep.

indicators.name: hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring can be noisy and uncomfortable, potentially disrupting sleep.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The brick walls, glass windows, metal railings, and hard flooring all contribute to a noisy, uncomfortable environment that would likely disrupt sleep patterns.
